name: Doctor Doom
description: Victor Von Doom, the absolute monarch of Latveria, is simultaneously one of the greatest scientific minds and most powerful sorcerers on Earth. Scarred in a college experiment, Doom forged an iconic iron mask and suit of armor powered by both technology and dark magic. His intellect rivals Richards and Stark, his magical knowledge approaches that of Doctor Strange, and his will is utterly indomitable. Doom has conquered nations, manipulated cosmic powers, and even stolen the power of gods.
